name: io.github.dtkmn/mcp-zap-server
title: MCP ZAP Server
description: Safe, self-hosted OWASP ZAP operator for guided AI security scans and reports.

io.modelcontextprotocol.registry/publish.installation: Docker Compose is the supported installation path because the MCP server is designed to run with an OWASP ZAP sidecar, explicit auth keys, and local loopback port binding.
io.modelcontextprotocol.registry/publish.packageStatus: No OCI package is advertised yet. Add packages only after publishing a newly tagged image with io.modelcontextprotocol.server.name and documenting a tested single-image Docker run path.
